aboutMe: I am an undergraduate student in the Department of Automation at Tsinghua University.

My current research interests include World Action Models and 3D Computer Vision (3DCV). I am interested in building intelligent systems that understand the physical world, reason over 3D scenes, and predict actions and future states from visual observations.
